summary: B2B growth marketing professional with 6 years of SaaS marketing experience at Intercom and Zendesk, currently returning from a 3-year career break. Managed $800K annual paid acquisition budget driving 2,500+ qualified leads per quarter across Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and Meta. Experienced with HubSpot marketing automation, attribution modeling, and team leadership. Previously led a team of 4 spanning demand generation and content marketing functions.

experience.title: Senior Growth Marketing Manager
bullets: Managed $800K annual budget across Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and Meta platforms, generating 2,500+ MQLs per quarter
Designed and deployed 15 automated lead nurture workflows in HubSpot, boosting MQL-to-SQL conversion by 28%
Led team of 4 including 2 marketing coordinators, 1 content specialist, and 1 paid media contractor
Built attribution modeling framework tying marketing spend to $4.2M in pipeline-influenced ARR
Launched recurring webinar program with 20 sessions over tenure, averaging 350 registrants per event

experience.title: Growth Marketing Specialist
bullets: Ran demand generation campaigns targeting mid-market segment across paid search, email, and content channels
Managed HubSpot platform including email workflows, landing pages, and lead scoring configuration
Optimized Google Ads campaigns, reducing cost-per-lead by 35% while sustaining lead volume
Partnered with sales team on lead handoff processes and monthly pipeline review meetings

experience.title: Primary Caregiver
bullets: Stayed current with industry trends through HubSpot Academy certifications and marketing community participation
Earned Google Analytics 4 certification and renewed HubSpot Marketing Software certification
Completed 3 freelance marketing projects including SEO audit, email campaign, and landing page design

growth_marketing: paid acquisition (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Meta)
